Package io.micronaut.mcp.server

@Configuration @Requires(property="micronaut.mcp.server.enabled", notEquals="false", defaultValue="true") package io.micronaut.mcp.server
Micronaut MCP Server implementation built with Micronaut using the MCP Java SDK. MCP Java SDK
